title: Panettone Crusted Delicate Fish
description: A unique Chinese-inspired dish featuring panettone-crusted delicate fish, crispy and golden brown. A simple yet elegant meal for any occasion.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Season the fish fillets with salt and pepper.
Dip each fish fillet in the beaten eggs, then coat with crushed panettone.
Place the coated fish fillets on the prepared baking sheet.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until the fish is cooked through and the panettone crust is golden brown.
Garnish with crisp lettuce leaves and serve immediately.
Serve hot with your favorite Chinese-inspired sides.
